title: Index cohort set #3 — DepMap + Cell Model Passports + ICGC/PCAWG open
context: The third cohort set covers three distinct sources: (1) DepMap (Broad Institute) — cell-line dependency and omics data, CC-BY-4.0, entryType:cell-model-collection (counts are cell lines/models, NOT patients); (2) Cell Model Passports (Sanger Institute) — cell-line metadata, open license to be verified at gate; (3) ICGC/PCAWG open-access tier — international cancer genomics consortium open data (controlled tier excluded). DepMap may have been indexed as the pilot (pilot-007); if so, the pilot record is refined and additional DepMap releases are treated as version updates per the identity rule. The CI publish-gate linter (ci-linter-014) must be passing before this work is merged. Depends on triage-009 and ci-linter-014.
objective: Index DepMap (entryType:cell-model-collection, CC-BY-4.0), Cell Model Passports (license gate-verified), and ICGC/PCAWG open-access tier (controlled tier explicitly excluded) as distinct canonical records with gate artifacts, correct entryType/aggregateCounts, identity dedup, and oncology-data reviewer sign-off — with CI green via ci-linter-014.
acceptanceCriteria: DepMap is indexed as entryType:cell-model-collection; aggregateCounts reflects cell lines and models (not patients); CC-BY-4.0 license cited and rights booleans verified from the DepMap license page.
Cell Model Passports (Sanger) is indexed; license verified at gate from primary source text (not assumed open); gate artifact committed.
ICGC/PCAWG open-access tier is indexed; the ICGC controlled tier (individual-level genomic data) is explicitly excluded and noted in the record with a pointer to the exclusion register.
Each record gate-passed (gate-003 artifact committed); every field has a fieldProvenance citation; completeness score ≥ 90/100.
identityKeys set and cross-repository dedup applied (DepMap appears in multiple portals; PCAWG data accessible via ICGC, GDC, and DACO — one record per distinct cohort with hostingLocations[]).
Cancer types coded (OncoTree + NCIt/ICD-O-3); oncology-data reviewer signs off on coding and de-identification basis (especially for cell-line resources).
CI green (ci-linter-014 passing); license snapshots recorded; outputLicense CC-BY-4.0; DCO signed-off.
output: Committed catalog records (catalog/*.json) for DepMap, Cell Model Passports, and ICGC/PCAWG open tier with gate artifacts, fully cited, schema-valid, CI-green, licensed CC-BY-4.0.
